news.summary: On April 8, 2025, iCAD, Inc. revealed the appointment of Mark Koeniguer as Chief Commercial Officer (CCO). iCAD, a global leader in AI-powered breast health solutions, aims to eradicate hidden cancer. Mark Koeniguer's role is crucial in steering iCAD's global expansion. Listed on NASDAQ as ICAD, the company is dedicated to leveraging technology to combat cancer.
news.headline: iCAD appoints Mark Koeniguer as Chief Commercial Officer to lead global growth.

news.summary: Rising demand for resilient supply chains, integration of artificial intelligence (AI) and Internet of Things (IoT), and digital transformation are propelling market growth. A recent market research report on the manufacturing sector reveals these factors are key drivers fueling the supply chain management market. Released on April 8, 2025, in Redding, California, the report focuses on the market in manufacturing, categorizing it by component into solutions...
news.headline: Supply Chain Management in Manufacturing market to hit $52.4 billion by 2032, growing at 10.4% CAGR from 2025 due to digital transformation and AI integration.

news.summary: A charity golf tournament called Tee Up 4 St. Jude will be held at Bear Creek Golf Club in Murrieta, California on June 9, 2025. The event is organized by Safeguard Investment Advisory Group and aims to support St. Jude Children's Research Hospital. This inaugural tournament is set to bring together golf enthusiasts and donors to raise funds for the hospital's noble cause.
news.headline: Charity golf tournament, Tee Up 4 St. Jude, at Bear Creek Golf Club on June 9, 2025, to benefit St. Jude Children's Hospital.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent to meet with the Republican Study Committee tomorrow - Fox.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Assembly, a prominent worldwide media agency, revealed the selection of Ilana Casser as the Executive Vice President of Growth for North America. Casser, situated in New York, will be reporting to Pele Cortizo-Burgess, the Global Chief Strategy Officer. This move highlights the company's strategy to bolster its presence in North America and continue its growth trajectory.
news.headline: Ilana Casser appointed EVP of Growth for North America at Assembly media agency in New York. Appoints to report to Global CSO.

news.summary: In DELRAY BEACH, Florida, as of April 8, 2025, projections indicate that the US Weather Forecasting System market is set to grow to USD 832.2 million by 2029 from its 2024 value of USD 620.1 million, reflecting a steady compound annual growth rate of 6.1%. These insights were gleaned from a recent study conducted by MarketsandMarkets™. The long-term outlook suggests a promising trajectory for the market...
news.headline: USA Weather Forecasting System Market to reach $832.2 million in 2029 from $620.1 million in 2024, growing at 6.1% CAGR.

news.summary: A seasoned sales executive and leader, Aaron Golden has been appointed as the Chief Growth Officer at Woolpert to drive the company's worldwide organic growth and key strategic initiatives. The appointment was made public on April 8, 2025, in Dayton, Ohio. Golden will spearhead Woolpert's expansion into fresh markets and focus on boosting the company's growth trajectory.
news.headline: Woolpert appoints Aaron Golden as Chief Growth Officer to drive global organic growth and strategic initiatives.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 8, 2025, the Crow Claw Eyewear Frame 9-P Apparel Halter was introduced. This innovative product features a single halter assembly with 7 main panel components and 7 connecting mechanisms, offering consumers a wide range of eyewear presentations and decorations.
news.headline: InventHelp inventor creates Crow Claw Eyewear Frame 9-P Apparel Halter with 7 main panel components and 7 connecting mechanisms for versatile eyewear looks.

news.summary: A prominent company based in Charlotte, North Carolina, known as David Moore & Partners, is currently spearheading a search for electrical contractors to participate in a roll-up acquisition agreement. The company is specifically interested in partnering with electrical and mechanical firms that boast an impressive annual sales figure exceeding $10 million. The sought-after candidates should ideally possess certain qualities and traits that align with the company's objectives.
news.headline: David Moore & Partners seek electrical contractors with over $10 million sales for roll-up acquisition deal in Charlotte.

news.summary: In Boston, Elastio, a top player in ransomware recovery assurance, has revealed a key partnership with JetSweep, a leading cloud-based Disaster Recovery as a Service (DRaaS) provider. This alliance aims to bolster business continuity solutions, enabling organizations to swiftly bounce back from cyber threats with minimal downtime. Given the rising complexity of cyberattacks and data breaches, companies need strong, verified recovery plans. Through this collaboration, JetSweep incorporates Elastio's expertise to ensure a seamless recovery process.
news.headline: Elastio partners with JetSweep to boost disaster recovery and ransomware protection, enhancing business continuity with minimal downtime.

news.summary: Diodes Incorporated, a company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol DIOD and based in Plano, Texas, recently unveiled its inaugural automotive-compliant 3D linear Hall effect sensor. Known as the AH4930Q, this sensor is designed to detect magnetic fields along the X, Y, and Z axes, enabling accurate and dependable contactless rotary motion and proximity sensing. It is particularly suitable for various applications such as rotary and push selectors in infotainment systems, stalk gear shifters, door handles and locks, and powered seat adjusters. Additionally, the AH4930Q comes equipped with a 12-bit temperature sensor for enhanced functionality.
news.headline: Diodes Inc. launches AH4930Q, a 12-bit I2C 3D linear Hall-Effect sensor, for automotive applications, simplifying rotary motion and proximity detection.

news.summary: In Takayama, Japan, Yoshijima House - YOSHIJIMA'S ATELIER is pleased to announce an upcoming exhibition showcasing works by Toko Shinoda at their location, the Yoshijima House, recognized as a nationally designated Important Cultural Property. This renowned house, crafted by Meiji-era artisan Isaburo Nishida, epitomizes Japanese craftsmanship and aesthetics with its exquisite spatial design. The exhibition will feature works by Toko Shinoda (1913-2021), a globally acclaimed artist.
news.headline: Exhibition of Toko Shinoda's works at Yoshijima House, important cultural property in Takayama City, Japan.
State New Room Reporter on X: Speaker Johnson tells us the plan is still to bring the budget resolution to the floor tomorrow.
